questions.question: Explain the difference between a physical network and a logical network. Provide one example of each.
questions.hint: Physical networks involve physical connections, while logical networks are based on device connections.

questions.question: What is the primary function of the OSI model's Layer 1? Describe its relevance to data communication.
questions.hint: Layer 1 is responsible for physical layer functions, including data transmission and signal encoding.

questions.question: What is the term for a network that connects multiple networks together using a common protocol? Provide an example of this type of network.
questions.hint: A metropolitan area network (MAN) is an example of a network that connects multiple networks together.
